name: 格洛克18型 | 战鹰
descriptionEn: The Glock 18 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents and is capable of firing three-round bursts. A custom paint job reminiscent of a previous era's war planes has been applied. It may not be the best plane on deck, but it is the most readily available
descriptionZh: 格洛克18型是把耐用的第一回合手枪，非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手，并且可以进行三连发爆炸开火。 武器上绘制着前代战斗机图案。 可能不是最好，但一定随叫随到
